description: Security monitoring, cost control, and AI safety mechanisms
prompt:
## Task:
Establish comprehensive monitoring and security barriers for the orchestration system, including real-time cost control, behavior auditing, and AI-generated content safety checks.

## Requirements:
1. Design real-time token consumption thresholds and cost circuit breaker mechanisms (Kill Switch)
2. Establish complete trace audit chains for all agent behaviors (based on OpenTelemetry)
3. Implement strict sensitive character filtering and prompt injection detection for AI-generated code
4. Monitor API rate limits and implement backoff strategies
5. Implement authentication and authorization for all endpoints
6. Design security incident response procedures
7. Conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments

## Output:
Security assessment report templates, circuit breaker implementation logic, audit trail configurations, content filtering rules, security monitoring dashboards, and incident response playbooks.
